final:
module top_module(
	input clk,
	input we_b,
	input [8:0] addr_a,
	input [8:0]	addr_b,
	input [1:0] data_b,
	output [1:0] q_a
	);reg [1:0] scene [0:299];

	
	assign q_a = (scene[addr_a]);

	
	  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ (posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt)
	begin
		if (we_b)
		begin
			scene[addr_b] <= data_b;
		end
	end

endmodule
